title: Predator Officially FLOPS in the Box Office!
description:
Predator Officially FLOPS in the Box Office! Predator: Badlands claws a $80M loss—global $183.4M ($90.6M domestic, $92.8M international) vs. $105M budget + costs (break-even $262M), with week 7 plunging 78% to $213K and losing 70% theaters. We break down the "woke" flop (feminized changes, no international surge), no sequels planned, franchise back to streaming, and comparisons to Aliens vs. Predator ($305M adjusted) and original ($280M). Is this Disney's end for big-screen Predator?

Timestamps:
0:00 - Intro: $80M Loss Revealed
0:53 - Box Office Numbers: $183.4M Total
1:50 - Week 7 Plunge: 78% Drop
2:08 - Break-Even Math & $80M Loss
3:08 - Woke Blame & Franchise Damage
4:50 - Comparisons to Past Films
5:50 - No Sequel & Streaming Future

If you're into Predator franchise news, Disney flops, or 2025 Hollywood critiques, like, subscribe, and comment if Badlands deserved better!
